contract_claim: L79-79: Docstring says 'Merge overlapping integer ranges' but the implementation also merges adjacent ranges (condition `start <= prev_end + 1` at L86, not `start <= prev_end`). Adjacent ranges like (1,5) and (6,10) are merged into (1,10) even though they do not overlap.
observed_behavior: Update docstring to: 'Merge overlapping and adjacent integer ranges. Returns sorted, non-overlapping ranges.'
